'''Senior General''' was a [[flag officer]] [[military rank]] utilized by the [[Chiss Ascendancy]]. It was above the rank of [[admiral]] and below [[Fleet Admiral]].<ref name="Greater Good" />

==Behind the scenes==
The rank of Senior General was first mentioned in the [[2020]] novel ''[[Thrawn Ascendancy: Greater Good]]'', the second installment in the ''[[Star Wars: The Ascendancy Trilogy]]'' by [[Timothy Zahn]].<ref name="Greater Good" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Thrawn Ascendancy: Greater Good]]'' {{Ab|Thrawn Ascendancy: Greater Good (audiobook)}} {{1stm}}
*''[[Thrawn Ascendancy: Lesser Evil]]'' {{Ab|Thrawn Ascendancy: Lesser Evil (audiobook)}} {{Mo}}
